tweets.author: serpentoraclepj.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Global Bitcoin mining’s water footprint has been estimated at levels equivalent to filling hundreds of thousands of Olympic-sized swimming pools annually, with additional indirect impacts from power production. 

Q

tweets.author: serpentoraclepj.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Mining operations, particularly for proof-of-work systems like Bitcoin, require substantial electricity—often sourced from water-intensive generation methods—and direct water for cooling mining rigs. 

Q

tweets.author: blockchainreport.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops ~20%, largest since China ban 2021. Analysts see miner capitulation, likely due to profitability issues. Impact on network security & transaction times is being watched, though BTC network is resilient. #Bitcoin #Crypto
